name: Merrin
description:
A knight of Solm and Princess Timerra's retainer. She is a suave woman who cherishes animals. Appears in Fire Emblem Engage.

This is Merrin, who came here from the queendom of Solm in Elyos! She's a dashing knight who serves Timerra, the crown princess, and brings her charm to the retinue with an effortlessly cool demeanor.

The daughter of a village matriarch, Merrin left home to pursue her dreams of becoming a knight. On her travels, she encountered Timerra in the midst of a battle, and became her retainer.

A devoted animal lover, Merrin's particularly fond of exotic creatures, and it's adorable how excited she can get when the topic comes up!

Despite her cool and collected exterior, Merrin has a sweet soft side too—but above all, she's a steadfastly loyal knight. And so, Merrin continues to fight for the princess to whom she pledged her blade!

Full Art By: Tantan (たん旦)
creator: Denki_The_Thunder_King27
